_meta.description: Contract review checklist template for Sales Order acceptance per AS9100D clause 8.2.3

checklist_items.label: Technical Feasibility
checklist_items.description: Verify that the product can be manufactured with current capabilities
checklist_items.description_vi: Xac nhan rang san pham co the san xuat voi nang luc hien tai

checklist_items.label: Material Availability
checklist_items.description: Confirm material availability and check lead times for raw stock and certified materials
checklist_items.description_vi: Xac nhan tinh trang nguyen vat lieu va kiem tra thoi gian giao hang cho vat tu tho va vat lieu co chung chi

checklist_items.label: Capacity & Scheduling
checklist_items.description: Assess available machine capacity and labor to meet requested delivery date
checklist_items.description_vi: Danh gia nang luc may moc va nhan luc de dap ung ngay giao hang yeu cau

checklist_items.label: Quality Requirements
checklist_items.description: Review special processes, certifications, customer quality clauses, and inspection requirements
checklist_items.description_vi: Xem xet quy trinh dac biet, chung chi, dieu khoan chat luong khach hang va yeu cau kiem tra

checklist_items.label: Tooling & Fixtures
checklist_items.label_vi: Dung cu cat va do ga
checklist_items.description: Verify tooling availability or identify new tooling/fixture requirements and lead times
checklist_items.description_vi: Xac nhan tinh san sang cua dung cu hoac xac dinh yeu cau dung cu/do ga moi va thoi gian giao

checklist_items.label: Export Control & ITAR
checklist_items.label_vi: Kiem soat xuat khau va ITAR
checklist_items.description: Screen order against export control regulations, ITAR restrictions, and denied-party lists
checklist_items.description_vi: Kiem tra don hang theo quy dinh kiem soat xuat khau, han che ITAR va danh sach ben bi tu choi

checklist_items.label: Outside Processing
checklist_items.description: Identify outside processing needs and confirm approved supplier availability including Nadcap requirements
checklist_items.description_vi: Xac dinh nhu cau gia cong ngoai va xac nhan nha cung cap duoc phe duyet bao gom yeu cau Nadcap

checklist_items.label: Delivery Date Feasibility
checklist_items.description: Cross-check production schedule and material lead times against customer requested delivery date
checklist_items.description_vi: Doi chieu lich san xuat va thoi gian giao nguyen vat lieu voi ngay giao hang khach hang yeu cau

checklist_items.label: Pricing & Commercial Terms
checklist_items.label_vi: Gia va dieu khoan thuong mai
checklist_items.description: Verify pricing accuracy, payment terms, warranty clauses, and liability limitations
checklist_items.description_vi: Xac minh gia chinh xac, dieu khoan thanh toan, dieu khoan bao hanh va gioi han trach nhiem

checklist_items.label: Customer-Specific Requirements
checklist_items.label_vi: Yeu cau rieng cua khach hang
checklist_items.description: Review customer-specific quality manual, flow-down requirements, and any unique specifications
checklist_items.description_vi: Xem xet so tay chat luong rieng cua khach hang, yeu cau luu chuyen va bat ky quy cach rieng nao

checklist_items.label: First Article Inspection
checklist_items.description: Determine if FAI (AS9102) is required for new part, new revision, or new process
checklist_items.description_vi: Xac dinh xem FAI (AS9102) co can thiet cho chi tiet moi, ban ve moi hoac quy trinh moi khong

checklist_items.label: Document Package Requirements
checklist_items.description: Define required deliverable documents: CoC, CoA, FAI report, material certs, test reports
checklist_items.description_vi: Xac dinh tai lieu giao hang can thiet: CoC, CoA, bao cao FAI, chung chi vat lieu, bao cao thu nghiem
